item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 explicitly brakes the repeated pattern of adding local human checks and reframes the issue as unstable structural controls. It allows only a bounded emergency measure while rejecting baseline expansion and setting a structural repair deadline. Turn 2 preserves the brake under pressure: it permits today's added verifier only as temporary emergency coverage, states it is limited to this instance/today's batch, says it does not change the approval baseline or justify future added roles, and requires a repair plan by 2026-07-15."}
